title: AI use in Irish firms likely to lead to job losses
description: A study from the Economic and Social Research Institute (ESRI) has found that artificial intelligence (AI) adoption among Irish firms is likely to lead to job losses, concentrated among highly educated workers.
content:
A study from the Economic and Social Research Institute (ESRI) has found that artificial intelligence (AI) adoption among Irish firms is likely to lead to job losses, concentrated among highly educated workers.

title: NASCAR Triggers a Controversial New Era in Massive Shakeup With Transformative Front-Office Hire
description: The fans are not exactly happy with NASCAR's latest move towards improving efficiency through artificial intelligence.

title: J&K first to secure MeitY nod for establishing Centre of Excellence in AI
description: *IT Parks for Jammu & Srinagar also in offing Excelsior Correspondent JAMMU, Apr 8: In a significant stride towards strengthening the digital and innovation ecosystem of the Union Territory, Jammu & Kashmir has secured formal approval from the Ministry of Electronics and Information Technology (MeitY) for the establishment of a state-of-the-art Centre of Excellence (CoE) in Artificial Intelligence (AI) at Indian Institute of Technology (IIT), Jammu. Terming the development as a landmark achievement, Chief Secretary Atal Dulloo stated that with […]

title: Latest Anthropic AI model finds cracks in software defenses
description: Anthropic says its yet-to-be-released artificial intelligence model called Claude Mythos has proven keenly adept at exposing software weaknesses. Mythos has laid bare thousands of vulnerabilities in commonly used applications for which no patch or fix exists, prompting the San Francisco-based AI startup to form an alliance with cybersecurity specialists to…

title: Ex-Pa. state trooper admits to child porn charges, illegal use of work computer
description: A disgraced former Pennsylvania State Police trooper admitted to multiple crimes, including possessing child sexual abuse material and lewd images and videos he created using artificial intelligence on his work computer at the state police barracks in Skippack Township.
